content:
This cannot be done on mobile as the link feature is not present. Easy way # Select the cell you want to add a link with (Double click & CTRL + A) Click the Insert link button in the top ribbon (CTRL + K) After the link menu pops up click the Sheets and named ranges button. After the menu changes select what workbook you would like to link. Hard way # This way is suitable if you don’t want to go back and forth
Open the workbook you would like to be the link destination. In the top address bar copy the workbook id e.g: #gid=XXXXXXXXXXXXX. Select the cell you want to add a link with (Double click & CTRL + A) Click the Insert link button in the top ribbon (CTRL + K) After the link menu pops up paste the #gid=XXXXXXXXX into the link URL and apply it.
title: How to add a link to another spreadsheet
